hooks.command: jq -r '.user_input // .prompt // ""' | grep -qiE '^full[[:space:]]+[A-Z]{1,5}$' && echo '{"systemMessage":"FULL WORKFLOW COMMAND DETECTED: Treat this as a request to complete the entire research workflow for the ticker. Read WORKFLOW-CHECKLIST.md, AGENT.md, and CLAUDE.md. Use the correct sector templates and checklists. Do not skip any required step, comparison note, company note update, or watchlist update."}' || true
